subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the precincts of thy Lord's mercy, the All-Merciful. Verily, there is no God but Him, the Mighty [3.5s]+JI1027
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما یوحی الیک من شطر رحمه ربک الرحمن انه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @consolation and comfort
